pi_items.source: Task description sets the agent's roleplay context as a Fleet Operations Coordinator.
Task description identifies the context as a regional logistics company.
Task description explicitly requires creating the 'Telematics' category, and verifier.py strictly enforces asset.get('category') == 'Telematics'.
Task description explicitly requires creating manufacturer 'Samsara', and verifier.py checks for it.
Task description explicitly requires creating these models, and verifier.py checks that assets are assigned either 'CM31 Dashcam' or 'VG34 ELD'.
Calculated manually from verifier.py score logic (C1: 15, C2: 25, C3: 30, C4: 10, C5: 10, C6: 10), perfectly matching the metadata values.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Snipe-IT vehicle asset data (VEH-101 to VEH-115) seeded by setup_task.sh. I confirmed the target taxonomy requirements (Telematics category, Samsara manufacturer, and expected models CM31 Dashcam / VG34 ELD) explicitly match the verifier.py logic. The scoring weights across six assessment criteria (taxonomy setup 15, asset registration 25, asset checkout integrity 30, checkout documentation 10, exception status 10, exception notes 10) are also perfectly and correctly enforced by the verifier script.
